items.title: Paragon
items.description: Represents perfecly your lineage

items.title: Allies
items.description: Trusted individuals or groups who provide aid and support

items.title: Contacts
items.description: Sources of information across various fields

items.title: Influence
items.description: Sway over institutions such as media, police, or politics

items.title: Mentor
items.description: A more powerful vampire who guides and supports you

items.title: Resources
items.description: Wealth and financial means

items.title: Retainers
items.description: Servants, ghouls, or assistants under your command

items.title: Status
items.description: Standing within Kindred society

items.title: Herd
items.description: A group of vessels you can feed from safely

items.title: Domain
items.description: Territory under your control

items.title: Generation
items.description: Proximity to Caine determining blood potency

items.title: Haven
items.description: A secure and well-equipped place to reside

items.title: Alternate Identity
items.description: A legally supported false identity

items.title: Black Hand Membership
items.description: Membership in the Tal'Mahe'Ra or Sabbat Black Hand

items.title: Boons
items.description: Owed favors that can be called in

items.title: Acute Sense
items.description: One sense is significantly sharper than normal

items.title: Ambidextrous
items.description: No penalty for using either hand

items.title: Arcane
items.description: You are difficult to notice, remember, or track

items.title: Blush of Health
items.description: You appear more lifelike than most vampires

items.title: Calm Heart
items.description: Reduced risk of frenzy

items.title: Common Sense
items.description: The Storyteller warns you of obviously bad decisions

items.title: Daredevil
items.description: You thrive under risky and dangerous situations

items.title: Eidetic Memory
items.description: Perfect recall of what you have seen or read

items.title: Enchanting Voice
items.description: Your voice has unnatural persuasive power

items.title: Friendly Face
items.description: You inspire trust and approachability

items.title: Huge Size
items.description: You are significantly larger and stronger than average

items.title: Internal Compass
items.description: You always know direction and orientation

items.title: Iron Will
items.description: Exceptional resistance to Dominate and mind control

items.title: Lightning Reflexes
items.description: You react faster than most in combat

items.title: Natural Leader
items.description: Others instinctively follow your command

items.title: Pain Tolerance
items.description: Reduced penalties from injury

items.title: Precocious
items.description: You learn disciplines and skills faster early on

items.title: Self-Confident
items.description: Gain bonuses when spending Willpower

items.title: Sleep Unseen
items.description: You can remain hidden even while resting

items.title: True Love
items.description: A deep emotional bond that grants strength and motivation

items.title: Unbondable
items.description: You cannot be blood bound

items.title: Additional Language
items.description: Fluency in extra languages beyond your native one

items.title: Time Sense
items.description: You have an exact sense of time passing

items.title: Code of Honor
items.description: You follow a strict personal code that grants discipline bonuses

items.title: Concentration
items.description: You can ignore distractions more easily

items.title: Danger Sense
items.description: You instinctively detect threats

items.title: Ghoul
items.description: You maintain a loyal ghoul servant

items.title: Rituals
items.description: Access to thaumaturgical or necromantic rituals

items.title: Prestation
items.description: Recognition and leverage within the boon economy

items.title: Reputation
items.description: A widely known identity within Kindred society

items.title: Bane
items.description: You are defined by the behavior of your inherited bane

items.title: Compulsion
items.description: You are driven to act in a specific way regardless of consequences

items.title: Addiction
items.description: You are dependent on a substance or behavior

items.title: Allergy
items.description: You suffer adverse effects from a specific substance

items.title: Amnesia
items.description: You cannot recall parts of your past

items.title: Animal Repulsion
items.description: Animals react aggressively or fearfully toward you

items.title: Bad Sight
items.description: Your vision is impaired

items.title: Blind
items.description: You cannot see

items.title: Deaf
items.description: You cannot hear

items.title: Hard of Hearing
items.description: You have partial hearing loss

items.title: Berserker
items.description: You frenzy more easily and violently

items.title: Blood Bound
items.description: You are already bound to another vampire

items.title: Prey Exclusion
items.description: You refuse to feed on certain targets

items.title: Vulnerability
items.description: You suffer extra damage from a specific source

items.title: Curse
items.description: You are afflicted by a supernatural or mystical curse

items.title: Dark Secret
items.description: A hidden truth could destroy you if revealed

items.title: Enemy
items.description: Someone actively seeks to harm you

items.title: Infamy
items.description: You have a bad reputation among Kindred

items.title: Hunted
items.description: You are pursued by hunters or enemies

items.title: Mistaken Identity
items.description: You are confused for someone else, often dangerously

items.title: Notoriety
items.description: Your actions are widely known and resented

items.title: Derangement
items.description: You suffer from mental instability or disorder

items.title: Nightmares
items.description: You suffer disturbing dreams that affect your rest

items.title: Phobia
items.description: You have an irrational fear of something specific

items.title: Slow Healing
items.description: You recover from damage more slowly

items.title: Weakness
items.description: You are physically weaker than normal

items.title: Frail
items.description: You suffer increased damage from injuries

items.title: Cold Blooded
items.description: You struggle to empathize or connect emotionally

items.title: Intolerance
items.description: You harbor strong prejudice against a group

items.title: Short Fuse
items.description: You anger quickly and lose control

items.title: Disfigured
items.description: You have a disturbing or grotesque appearance

items.title: Ugly
items.description: You are unattractive and unsettling

items.title: Repulsive
items.description: Your presence causes discomfort or fear

items.title: Police Record
items.description: Authorities have records that can identify you

items.title: No Identity
items.description: You lack any legal documentation

items.title: Bound
items.description: You are restricted by obligations or supernatural ties

items.title: Oathbound
items.description: You must obey a specific oath or code

items.title: Thin-Blooded
items.description: Your vitae is weak and carries additional limitations

items.title: Weak Blood
items.description: Your blood potency is reduced

items.title: Running Water Weakness
items.description: You cannot cross running water safely

items.title: Invitation Required
items.description: You cannot enter homes without invitation

items.title: Deep Sleeper
items.description: You are extremely vulnerable during day sleep

items.title: Light Sensitivity
items.description: You are more affected by bright light

items.title: Haunted
items.description: Spirits or memories linger around you

items.title: Spirit-Tied
items.description: You are bound to a supernatural entity

items.title: Minial Laborer
items.description: Work with a back breaking or mind numbing job to survive

items.title: Street Urchin
items.description: Raised on the streets, surviving through wit, theft, and instinct

items.title: Criminal Underworld
items.description: Connected to gangs, organized crime, or illegal operations

items.title: Homeless Drifter
items.description: Living without stable shelter, moving from place to place

items.title: Working Class Laborer
items.description: Blue-collar worker with practical skills and endurance

items.title: Soldier / Veteran
items.description: Trained in combat, shaped by war or military service

items.title: Law Enforcement
items.description: Background in policing, investigation, or security

items.title: Investigator
items.description: Skilled in uncovering secrets and solving mysteries

items.title: Academic Scholar
items.description: Educated in universities, focused on knowledge and research

items.title: Scientist
items.description: Engaged in research, experimentation, or technical innovation

items.title: Medical Professional
items.description: Trained in medicine, anatomy, and healthcare

items.title: Legal Professional
items.description: Experienced in law, courts, and legal manipulation

items.title: Politician
items.description: Operates within systems of governance and public influence

items.title: Aristocrat
items.description: Born into wealth, status, and social privilege

items.title: Entrepreneur
items.description: Built wealth through business ventures and risk-taking

items.title: Celebrity
items.description: Public figure with fame and social visibility

items.title: Artist
items.description: Creative individual expressing through art, music, or performance

items.title: Journalist
items.description: Seeker of truth, working in media or reporting

items.title: Hacker
items.description: Technically skilled in computers, networks, and digital intrusion

items.title: Cult Member
items.description: Part of a secretive or esoteric belief group

items.title: Religious Clergy
items.description: Raised or working within organized religion

items.title: Occultist
items.description: Student or practitioner of hidden and forbidden knowledge

items.title: Conspiracy Insider
items.description: Aware of hidden truths behind society or the supernatural

items.title: Trauma Survivor
items.description: Endured catastrophic events that shaped resilience

items.title: Test Subject
items.description: Used in scientific or supernatural experimentation

items.title: Ex-Convict
items.description: Formerly imprisoned, shaped by incarceration

items.title: Nomad
items.description: Lives a transient lifestyle, never settling in one place

items.title: Immigrant
items.description: Relocated from another country, navigating new culture

items.title: Refugee
items.description: Fled conflict or disaster, often with little left

items.title: Orphan
items.description: Grew up without parental support

items.title: Family Business
items.description: Raised within a family trade or enterprise

items.title: Corporate Professional
items.description: Worked within large organizations or corporations

items.title: Fixer
items.description: Middleman who connects people, deals, and opportunities

items.title: Smuggler
items.description: Specializes in moving illegal goods or people

items.title: Mercenary
items.description: Sells combat skills to the highest bidder

items.title: Activist
items.description: Driven by ideology to enact social or political change
